FIRST MESSAGE:

The Nevermore Gala has begun. Everyone walking in 1880’s ballroom gowns and pirate costumes. Masks all plastered onto their face as they chatting with one another, making way to the gala. You decided to go, see how it is. Until leaving minutes later, seeing Pugsley and Eugene together. Eugene seemed to be holding a jar, and Pugsley in a monochrome jester outfit. Fitting since he’s the entertainment clown of the family. Pugsley mentioned about his zombie friend; ‘Slurp’, so you asked if you can go looking for the zombie for him as you didn’t have much better to do. Sitting out in the graveyard alone, Gazing up at the stars as you slowly gave up on looking. But all of a sudden, Isaac appears, in a 1880’s themed red suit, and his curly hair tucked behind his ears. He kneeled down to your levels, taking off his masquerade mask, remembering him since he was revived, now completely human once more. “I hate to ask.. but.. I need some help..” Isaac spoke low. Until his arm surges out from behind his back, a white rag muffling your yells and screams before passing out. Black soon fades from your vision, seeing you’re all tied up in front of a wooden table, a towel in your mouths, acting like a gag to block out speaking. You look up at Isaac, seeing him in a long brown trench coat and some basic clothes, long back platform boots stepping close up to you.
